question: If Forbes & Bloomberg disagree about whether Musk is a trillionaire before July 2026, will Ynad23's market resolve YES?
reason: Bloomberg and Forbes estimates of Musk's net worth differ by over $100 billion.
evidence: As of May 24, 2026, Forbes estimates Musk's net worth at $827.7 billion. ([forbes.com](https://www.forbes.com/profile/elon-musk?utm_source=openai))
As of May 20, 2026, Bloomberg estimates Musk's net worth at $676 billion. ([bloomberg.com](https://www.bloomberg.com/billionaires/?utm_source=openai))
The discrepancy between Forbes and Bloomberg's estimates exceeds $100 billion.
